mapper.select:
SELECT partyId, themeImg, themeName, resDate, resTime, partyName, avgAge, avgTemp, memberCount, status FROM ( SELECT A.PARTY_ID AS partyId ,D.ROOM_IMG AS themeImg, D.ROOM_NAME AS themeName , TO_CHAR(C.OPEN_AT,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS resDate, TO_CHAR(C.OPEN_AT,'HH24:MI') AS resTime , A.PARTY_NAME AS partyName, E.AGE AS avgAge, E.TEMP AS avgTemp, E.COUNT AS memberCount , FN_GET_PARTY_CONDITION(A.PARTY_ID) AS STATUS FROM PARTY A JOIN PARTY_ROOM B ON A.PARTY_ID = B.PARTY_ID JOIN RES_OPEN C ON B.RES_OPEN_ID = C.RES_OPEN_ID JOIN ROOM D ON C.ROOM_ID = D.ROOM_ID JOIN ( SELECT PARTY_ID,TRUNC(NVL(AVG(AGE),-1),1) AS AGE, TRUNC(NVL(AVG(TEMP),-1),1) AS TEMP, COUNT(*) AS COUNT FROM VW_PARTY_ACTIVE_MEMBER GROUP BY PARTY_ID ) E ON A.PARTY_ID = E.PARTY_ID WHERE C.OPEN_AT > SYSDATE + 1 ) T
AND STATUS = 'open'
AND partyId < #{lastId}
ORDER BY partyId DESC FETCH FIRST 2 ROWS ONLY

SELECT A.PARTY_ID AS partyId, A.PARTY_NAME AS partyName , E.CAFE_NAME AS cafeName, D.ROOM_NAME AS themeName , TO_CHAR(C.OPEN_AT,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS resDate , TO_CHAR(C.OPEN_AT,'HH24:MI') AS resTime, B.RES_OPEN_ID AS slotId , D.MIN_PLAYERS AS minPlayers, D.MAX_PLAYERS AS maxPlayers , D.PRICE AS Price, FN_RESERVATION_CHECK(C.RES_OPEN_ID) AS slotStatus , A.GENDER_ID AS genderId, A.USER_ID AS userID , F.GENDER_NAME AS genderName, A.MESSAGE AS partyComment , FN_GET_PARTY_CONDITION(A.PARTY_ID) AS partyStatus FROM PARTY A JOIN PARTY_ROOM B ON A.PARTY_ID = B.PARTY_ID JOIN RES_OPEN C ON B.RES_OPEN_ID = C.RES_OPEN_ID JOIN ROOM D ON C.ROOM_ID = D.ROOM_ID JOIN CAFE E ON D.CAFE_ID = E.CAFE_ID JOIN GENDER_CONDITION F ON F.GENDER_ID = A.GENDER_ID WHERE A.PARTY_ID = #{partyId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PARTY_APPLY(APPLY_ID, PARTY_ID, USER_ID,APPLY_MESSAGE, CREATED_AT) VALUES(PARTY_APPLY_SEQ.NEXTVAL,#{partyId},#{userId},#{applyComment},SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT A.RES_OPEN_ID AS slotId, C.CAFE_NAME AS cafeName, B.ROOM_NAME AS themeName, B.ROOM_ID AS themeId , TO_CHAR(A.OPEN_AT,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS resDate, TO_CHAR(A.OPEN_AT,'HH24:MI') AS resTime, B.IS_ADULT AS adult , B.MIN_PLAYERS AS minPlayers, B.MAX_PLAYERS AS maxPlayers, B.PRICE AS price, FN_RESERVATION_CHECK(A.RES_OPEN_ID) AS status FROM RES_OPEN A JOIN ROOM B ON A.ROOM_ID = B.ROOM_ID JOIN CAFE C On B.CAFE_ID = C.CAFE_ID WHERE A.RES_OPEN_ID = #{slotId}

SELECT A.MESSAGE_ID AS commentId,A.PARTY_ID, B.NICKNAME AS nickName, A.CONTENT AS partyComment, A.USER_ID AS userId, TO_CHAR(A.CREATED_AT,'MM-DD HH24:MI') AS createdAt FROM PARTY_MESSAGE A JOIN USER_ACCOUNT B ON A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID WHERE A.PARTY_ID = #{partyId} AND A.MESSAGE_ID > #{lastCommentId} ORDER BY A.CREATED_AT

SELECT A.DELETE_ID AS deleteId, A.MESSAGE_ID as commentId FROM MESSAGE_DELETE A JOIN PARTY_MESSAGE B ON A.MESSAGE_ID = B.MESSAGE_ID WHERE B.PARTY_ID = #{partyId} AND A.DELETE_ID > #{lastDeleteCommentId}
SELECT A.USER_ID AS userId FROM PARTY_MESSAGE A WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM MESSAGE_DELETE B WHERE A.MESSAGE_ID = B.MESSAGE_ID ) AND A.MESSAGE_ID = #{commentId}

SELECT MEMBER_ID AS crewId,USER_ID AS userId , NICKNAME AS nickName, AGE AS age, GENDER AS gender , TEMP AS temp, READY AS ready, POSITION AS position ,APPLY_ID AS applyId FROM VW_PARTY_ACTIVE_MEMBER WHERE PARTY_ID = #{partyId} ORDER BY JOINDT
SELECT PARTY_ID, USER_ID, POSITION FROM VW_PARTY_ACTIVE_MEMBER A WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{crewId} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM PARTY_KICK B WHERE A.MEMBER_ID = B.MEMBER_ID )

SELECT A.APPLY_ID AS applyId, B.NICKNAME AS nickName , C.GENDER AS gender,FN_GET_USER_AGE(C.BIRTHDATE) AS age ,FN_GET_MANNER(A.USER_ID) AS temp, A.APPLY_MESSAGE AS applyComment , A.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, A.PARTY_ID as partyId, B.USER_ID AS userId FROM PARTY_APPLY A JOIN USER_ACCOUNT B ON A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID JOIN USER_INFO C ON A.USER_ID = C.USER_ID WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM PARTY_MEMBER D WHERE D.APPLY_ID = A.APPLY_ID ) AND A.PARTY_ID = #{partyId} ORDER BY A.CREATED_AT DESC
SELECT CASE WHEN ( SELECT GENDER FROM USER_INFO WHERE USER_ID = #{applyUserId} ) = ( SELECT GENDER FROM USER_INFO WHERE USER_ID = #{partyHostId} ) THEN 1 ELSE 2 END FROM DUAL

SELECT B.PARTY_NAME AS partyName, E.ROOM_NAME AS themeName , TO_CHAR(D.OPEN_AT,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS resDate , TO_CHAR(D.OPEN_AT,'HH24:MI') AS resTime, A.APPLY_ID applyId FROM PARTY_APPLY A JOIN PARTY B ON A.PARTY_ID = B.PARTY_ID JOIN PARTY_ROOM C ON B.PARTY_ID = C.PARTY_ID JOIN RES_OPEN D ON C.RES_OPEN_ID = D.RES_OPEN_ID JOIN ROOM E ON D.ROOM_ID = E.ROOM_ID WHERE A.USER_ID = #{userId} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM PARTY_MEMBER F WHERE A.APPLY_ID = F.APPLY_ID ) ORDER BY A.CREATED_AT DESC

SELECT B.PARTY_NAME AS partyName, E.ROOM_NAME AS themeName , TO_CHAR(D.OPEN_AT,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS resDate , TO_CHAR(D.OPEN_AT,'HH24:MI') AS resTime , B.PARTY_ID AS partyId , FN_GET_PARTY_CONDITION(A.PARTY_ID) AS partyStatus FROM VW_PARTY_ACTIVE_MEMBER A JOIN PARTY B ON A.PARTY_ID = B.PARTY_ID JOIN PARTY_ROOM C ON A.PARTY_ID = C.PARTY_ID JOIN RES_OPEN D ON C.RES_OPEN_ID = D.RES_OPEN_ID JOIN ROOM E ON D.ROOM_ID = E.ROOM_ID WHERE A.USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY B.CREATED_AT DESC

SELECT D.PARTY_NAME AS partyName, G.ROOM_NAME AS themeName , TO_CHAR(F.OPEN_AT,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS resDate , TO_CHAR(F.OPEN_AT,'HH24:MI') AS resTime , TO_CHAR(A.CREATED_AT,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS kickDate , TO_CHAR(A.CREATED_AT,'HH24:MI') AS kickTime FROM PARTY_KICK A JOIN PARTY_MEMBER B ON A.MEMBER_ID = B.MEMBER_ID JOIN PARTY_APPLY C ON B.APPLY_ID = C.APPLY_ID JOIN PARTY D ON C.PARTY_ID = D.PARTY_ID JOIN PARTY_ROOM E ON D.PARTY_ID = E.PARTY_ID JOIN RES_OPEN F ON E.RES_OPEN_ID = F.RES_OPEN_ID JOIN ROOM G ON F.ROOM_ID = G.ROOM_ID WHERE C.USER_ID = #{userId} AND A.CREATED_AT > SYSDATE - 7 ORDER BY A.CREATED_AT DESC
SELECT CAFE_ID AS cafeId, CAFE_NAME AS cafeName FROM CAFE A WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM CAFE_DROP B WHERE A.CAFE_ID = B.CAFE_ID )
SELECT A.ROOM_ID AS themeId , A.ROOM_NAME AS themeName FROM ROOM A WHERE A.CAFE_ID = #{cafeId} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ROOM_DROP B WHERE A.ROOM_ID = B.ROOM_ID )

SELECT T.RES_OPEN_ID AS AS slotId, TO_CHAR(T.OPEN_AT,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS resDate FROM ( SELECT RES_OPEN_ID, OPEN_AT, FN_RESERVATION_CHECK(RES_OPEN_ID) AS STATUS FROM RES_OPEN A WHERE ROOM_ID = #{themeId} AND OPEN_AT > SYSDATE + 1 ) T WHERE T.STATUS = 1
